nasb.text: You hypocrites! You know how to analyze the appearance of the earth and the sky, but why do you not analyze this present time?

esv.text: You hypocrites! You know how to interpret the appearance of earth and sky, but why do you not know how to interpret the present time?

cnv.text: 偽君子啊！你們知道分辨天地的氣象，怎麼不知道分辨這個時代呢？

ccb.text: 你们这些伪善的人！既然知道观察天色、预测天气，为什么不知道观察这个世代呢？

csbs.text: 你们这些伪善的人！你们懂得分辨天地的气象，怎么不懂得分辨这个时代呢？
